name: Lentil Stuffed Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the lentils and soak for 30 minutes.
2. Heat half of the oil in a skillet. Add the peppers and cook for 3 to 5 minutes until golden brown.
3. Drain the peppers and let them cool.
4. Add the remaining oil to the pan. Cook the cumin seeds until they begin to pop.
5. Add the onions and chilies, and cook for 8 minutes.
6. Stir in the grated ginger and ground coriander.
7. Drain the lentils and add them to the pan with water. Stir well and cover.
8. Cook for 15 to 20 minutes until the liquid has evaporated.
9. Stir in salt and pepper, then add chopped cilantro.
10. Cut off the tops of the peppers and remove the seeds.
11. Stuff the lentils into the peppers and replace the tops.
12. Place in a baking dish and bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
